_comment: Copy this file to applicant-profile.json and fill in YOUR data. This is the data Playwright types into job application forms.

eeo._comment: Optional EEO self-identification. Leave null to skip these questions if the form allows.

accountCredentials._comment: Used for creating accounts on external career sites (Workday, Taleo, etc.). NOT for LinkedIn/Indeed.

emailCredentials._comment: Gmail App Password for IMAP email reading. Create at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords. Regular password will NOT work for IMAP.

answers._comment: Common screening question answers. Playwright will match these to form questions by keyword.
answers.What are your salary expectations?: I'm flexible and more interested in the opportunity and growth path. I'm happy to discuss based on the full compensation package.
